steps.title: Match the appeal clue
steps.content: The example says people find paintings with blues and greens more appealing than paintings with yellows and oranges. The blank needs a phrase about colors pleasing viewers.

steps.title: Reject illogical phrases
steps.content: Choice A suggests confusion, not appeal. Choice C says viewers correct colors. Choice D says colors are similar to viewers. The needed phrase means appealing or pleasing to viewers. The answer is B.
